markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.066 — Aeronautical Publications

(a) The department may issue aeronautical publications as required in the public interest.

(b) The department shall charge a fee sufficient to recover the cost of preparing and distributing a department publication that does not clearly promote public safety.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may issue aeronautical publications as required in the public interest.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall charge a fee sufficient to recover the cost of preparing and distributing a department publication that does not clearly promote public safety.
